name: GetBlock
description: Blockchain-as-a-service provider offering JSON-RPC, REST and WebSocket endpoints for 50+ chains with dedicated nodes.

seo.title: GetBlock — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: GetBlock: Blockchain-as-a-service provider offering JSON-RPC, REST and WebSocket endpoints for 50+ chains with dedicated nodes.

when_to_use: JSON-RPC endpoints for 50+ chains for Web3 dapp
Dedicated blockchain node for high-frequency queries
WebSocket streaming for real-time on-chain events
REST API for blockchain data in fintech analytics

review.verdict: A reasonable multichain RPC budget choice—suits secondary provider or cost-sensitive projects.
review.best_for: Cost-sensitive multichain apps wanting both shared and dedicated node options
review.not_for: Projects needing premium SLAs or rich enhanced APIs

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier; no explicit peak-lock or reserved-capacity evidence.
